items.title: Charcoal-Grilled Bratwurst
items.description: Pork, beef, onion, and spice, finished over an open flame.

items.title: Smoked Polish
items.description: Beef, pork, garlic, and paprika, smoked low and slow.

items.title: Lakeview Garlic Link
items.description: A heavy hand of roasted garlic, beef, and pork, named for the neighborhood.

items.title: Hot Italian
items.description: Pork, paprika, garlic, and a real kick of heat.

items.title: Duck & Fig
items.description: Duck, pork, and mission figs, with a whisper of thyme.

items.title: Wild Boar & Apple
items.description: Wild boar, pork, and diced apple, with a touch of sage.

items.title: Venison & Juniper
items.description: Venison, beef, and crushed juniper berry, finished with black pepper.

items.title: Smoked Chicken & Peach
items.description: Smoked chicken, cilantro, and jalapeño, sweetened with fresh peach.

items.title: Buffalo Chicken Link
items.description: Chicken, celery, and a proper buffalo kick, served with blue cheese crumble.

items.title: Bear Down Burger
items.description: A double-stacked patty with bacon, cheddar, and a fried onion ring on top.

items.title: Wrigley Blue Burger
items.description: Blue cheese crumble, caramelized onion, and a garlic aioli.

items.title: Southport Melt
items.description: Swiss cheese, grilled onions, and a mushroom cream sauce.

items.title: Firehouse Jalapeño Burger
items.description: Pepper jack, fresh jalapeños, and a chipotle mayo that means business.

items.title: The Vegan Underdog
items.description: A plant-based patty, vegan cheddar, and all the usual fixings — no compromises.
